title: IDC nearly doubles worldwide smartphone forecast for 2025, cites ‘accelerated iOS growth’
summary: To say 2025 has been an unpredictable year for the smartphone market would be an understatement. Early in February, IDC had forecast a 2.6% growth, followed by a decrease to just 0.6% in May. Now, the institute has once again adjusted its forecast, thanks in part to “accelerated” iOS growth. Here are the details. more…
